data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Consultation booking included (monthly check-in)', but the evidence provided does not confirm this requirement. While there are multiple successful steps related to bookings, none specifically address the inclusion of a monthly consultation as part of the subscription service. The linked use case mentions the need for a consultation, but without concrete evidence of its implementation or validation, this requirement remains unfulfilled.
gaps: No evidence of a monthly consultation booking being included in the subscription.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Verify consultation booking feature
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Check if the system allows booking of monthly consultations as part of the subscription.
